name: Spaghettini Alla Carrettiera
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground red chile, fresh tomatoes, minced garlic, and olive oil in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring occasionally until reduced by half, about 30 minutes.
3. Run the mixture through a food mill or sieve to remove seeds and skins, pressing them through to ensure a smooth sauce.
4. Return the pureed sauce to the pan, add the heavy cream and vodka.
5. Simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes until the sauce has reduced slightly and thickened.
6. Cook the spaghettini in 4 quarts of boiling salted water until tender but still firm (al dente), about 1-2 minutes.
7. Drain the pasta well, reserving some cooking water if needed for serving.
8. Mix the sauce with the cooked spaghetti and sprinkle with coarsely chopped parsley before serving.
